title: User registration and login
description: Allow users to register with email and password and log in securely with session management

title: Project dashboard
description: Main dashboard showing all active projects, their status, and key metrics

title: Task assignment and tracking
description: Assign tasks to team members, set due dates, and track completion status

title: Email notifications for task updates
description: Send email notifications when tasks are assigned, updated, or change status

title: Export project report as PDF
description: Generate and download a project summary report as a PDF file

title: Search across projects and tasks
description: Full-text search bar to find tasks, projects, and team members

title: User profile and settings
description: Users can update their display name, avatar, and notification preferences

title: Dark mode support
description: Toggle between light and dark UI themes, persisted per user
